subject: A wide pastoral river valley, sunlit water winding between forested green hills toward distant mountains under a blue sky with light cloud cover and visible sunrays.
description: A serene wide-angle landscape: a broad river snakes from the foreground through a valley flanked by rolling hills heavy with deep-green forest. Tree-covered slopes step back layer by layer toward hazier distant mountains on the horizon. The sky is a soft blue with scattered cumulus clouds, and clear shafts of sunlight (god-rays) angle down through the cloud breaks, sparkling on the river's surface. The water reads as calm and reflective, picking up the sky's pale blue and the green of the banks. There are no figures, structures, or creatures visible — it is pure wilderness vista.
foreground: calm river surface and grassy/forested near bank
background: layered forested hills receding into blue-gray distant mountains under a cloud-dappled sky with sunrays
emotion: tranquil, expansive, contemplative — a calm wilderness breath
